title: lumainomai #3075
definition:
1) to affix a stigma to, to dishonour, spot, defile
 2) to treat shamefully or with injury, to ravage, devastate, ruin
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to affix a stigma to, to dishonour, spot, defile
 2) to treat shamefully or with injury, to ravage, devastate, ruin

    NASB:  to outrage, to corrupt:
